_meta.description: Automation displacement probabilities by ISCO-08 4-digit code. Raw scores from Frey & Osborne (2013) mapped from US SOC codes via the standard SOC-to-ISCO crosswalk.
_meta.source: Frey, C. B. & Osborne, M. A. (2013). The Future of Employment: How susceptible are jobs to computerisation? Oxford Martin School working paper.
_meta.method_note: Original Frey-Osborne scores are SOC-coded. To map onto ISCO we use the SOC-to-ISCO correspondence table; where multiple SOC codes map to one ISCO unit group we take the mean. See soc_crosswalk in isco08_taxonomy.json for the source SOC codes per ISCO entry.
_meta.calibration_note: raw_probability is the global F-O score. Production code MUST multiply by countries.<CC>.automation_calibration.infrastructure_factor before reporting. calibrated_score = raw_probability * infrastructure_factor
_meta.honesty_note: Frey-Osborne is a 2013 estimate calibrated on US labour markets. It systematically overstates risk in LMICs (hence the country-specific infrastructure_factor) and underweights post-2020 generative AI exposure for cognitive occupations. Treat as a directional signal, not a forecast.
_meta.anchoring_note: 11 of 14 ISCO entries are raw-anchored: raw_probability is the mean of F-O 2013 probabilities across all SOC-2010 codes that crosswalk to that ISCO (per data/raw/crosswalk/soc-2018-to-isco-08.csv). 3 ISCOs (2519, 3512, 9211) have no F-O coverage for their crosswalked SOCs and remain composite - flagged with confidence:'composite' and a note.

2519.note: 15-1199 (Computer Occupations, All Other) not present in F-O 2013 dataset; raw_probability is a composite estimate.

3512.note: 15-1151 (Computer User Support Specialists) not present in F-O 2013 dataset; raw_probability is a composite estimate.

3514.note: Only 15-1142 (Network and Computer Systems Administrators) present in F-O. F-O treated this as low-automation knowledge work; current generative-AI exposure is likely materially higher.

6111.note: Only 45-1011 (First-Line Supervisors of Farming) present in F-O. Crop labourer SOCs not covered.

7412.note: Mean across 13 crosswalked SOCs including a supervisor role (49-1011, prob 0.003) which pulls the mean down. Range across SOCs: 0.003 - 0.93.

7421.note: Mean across 7 crosswalked SOCs including a supervisor role (49-1011, prob 0.003).

9211.note: Crop farm labourer SOCs (45-2092, 45-2099) not present in F-O 2013 dataset; raw_probability is a composite estimate.
